creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I no longer use this port, and I have no intention to ugprade it to a new 
release, or fix bugs in it, because the amount of FreeBSD specific patching is 
huge, and the patches don't apply on never versions. 

If you can't fix this problem yourself, I'm afraid it will not be fixed at all. 

BTW have you also tried sysutils/pstree port?
